metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3025
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.4: "Electron micrographs of the cerebellar cortex showing immunoreactivity for SK2 during postnatal development as detected using a pre-embedding immunogold method."
- "At P21, the highest density of SK2 immunoparticles was detected along the extrasynaptic plasma membrane of PC dendritic spines, followed by dendritic shafts (Figures 4K-L; Table Table1).1). At the presynaptic level, immunolabelling for SK2 was identifiable in PF synapses and their terminals (Figures 4M-N; Table Table1).1)."

27/3/2018 Pim
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: - "OF-1 mice from the day of birth (P0) to adulthood obtained from the Animal H..."
